info.name: 03 CHMED API
info.description:
Handles all operations related to the CHMED format.

##### **Features**

- Deserialization
    
- Serialization
    
- Value Sets _(e.g., allergies, risks)_
    
- Medication Reasons
    
- PDF generation
    

StartFragmentRoute to generate valid token : `03 Get and Save Token for CHMED API`

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl --location 'https://aca-chmed-dev-api-public-rest.kindstone-d7932f8f.westeurope.azurecontainerapps.io/chmed16a/medication-plan/pdf' \
--header 'Accept: application/pdf' \
--data '{
  "chMed16A": "",
  "logo": "",
  "organization": "Krajcik and Sons\n071 Konopelski Pine\nSophiaborough"
}'
